# Agente.Systems

> Bilingual EN/ES AI agents for Latino-owned US small businesses — WhatsApp-native, industry-expert, flat monthly pricing, live in 24 hours.

Agente.Systems deploys vertical AI agents that know an industry cold (codes,
regulations, incentives, market rates) and reply natively in English, Spanish,
or Spanglish on every channel customers actually use — phone, WhatsApp, SMS,
Instagram DMs, Facebook Lead Ads, and web forms. Each agent has a fixed
SOUL.md persona, never negotiates terms, and routes hot leads to humans.
The alternative to Lindy for bilingual US markets.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Bilingual EN/ES AI agents for SMBs — overview, comparison vs Lindy, verticals, pricing, contact.
- [Real estate — Carmen](/real-estate): Buyer qualification, showing bookings, and hot-lead digests for US real estate teams.
- [Construction — Marco](/construction): Lead qualification, free estimate booking, and full client lifecycle for DC/MD/VA contractors.
- [Solar — Sol](/solar): Lead qualification, site-survey booking, and homeowner updates through permit, install, and PTO for US solar installers.
- [Medical — Grace](/medical): HIPAA-aware intake, insurance verification, and appointment booking for US clinics.
- [Beauty & wellness — Bella](/beauty): DM/WhatsApp/missed-call replies, booking, deposits, and no-show reduction for US salons and spas.
- [Book a demo](/demo): 30-minute live walkthrough on your real lead flow, demoed in EN/ES/Spanglish.
